Spatial view of wings, rooms, tunnels, and knowledge structure

Explore

Tip: use 1 2 3 to switch views, R to reset the camera.

Motion
Wings & scale

Sphere size reflects drawer count within a view.

Loading palace data…

Inspector
Nothing selected
Drawers — Wings — Rooms — Tunnel nodes — Cross-wing — Knowledge graph — Focus

1–3 · R camera · L labels · Space rotate · Esc unpin/clear

Shortcuts & interaction

  • 1 / 2 / 3 — Switch Wings / Rooms / Graph view
  • R — Reset camera
  • L — Toggle labels
  • Space — Toggle auto-rotate
  • Esc — Unpin inspector, or clear selection
  • Click wing (Wings) — Enter that wing’s rooms
  • Click room (Rooms) — Select & center
  • Click node (Graph) — Select & pin
  • Click empty canvas — Clear selection (unless pinned)
  • Breadcrumb — Navigate: All wings → wing → refocus room
